listitem.para: What are traditional verbal and nonverbal communication practices in Russian culture?
How do Russians value their time and punctuality?
What are the decision-making practices of current Russian immigrants?
List one health care condition in Russians in each of the three categories: environment, lifestyle, and genetics. What can you do to decrease the incidence and prevalence of these diseases?
What are common high-risk health behaviors among Russian immigrants? Include some strategies for reducing them.
What are fertility practices among Russians? What education would you provide to the family about childbirth and contraception practices?
Many Russians are afraid of having X-rays and CT scans. What is the reason for this? What can you do to decrease their fear?
Identify a traditional treatment that Russians use for respiratory symptoms. How would you know that this treatment is being used?
Identify some practices women use during pregnancy.
Identify some cultural and traditional Russian practices. Which of them might have harmful effects?
